title: How is Flying for the Air Force Different Than the Navy?
text:
Airman Pulse
A weekly podcast featuring analysis of issues critical to Airmen with experts currently serving in and retired from the U.S. Air Force.

How is Flying for the Air Force Different Than the Navy?
Airman Pulse
Paul Garcia and Collin Meisel
July 2, 2026

Sign up now and start listening to "Airman Pulse!"Already a member? Sign In to have access to our podcasts

Episode Notes:
Paul "Gu$" Garcia, former Air Force and Naval aviator, talks flying culture and logistics across services. He recounts the surreal experience of catapult launches and arrested landings on aircraft carriers, and shares insights into the challenges of transitioning between airframes and the importance of continuous learning.
Image: Staff Sgt. Lauren Diaz via DVIDS
